decision.decision: Value gap appears only after OT/reset; prioritize transport/resampling semantics.
decision.main_uncertainty: Whether finite Sinkhorn epsilon or reset-to-uniform is the dominant OT effect.
decision.next_action: Inspect whether OT reset preserves the marginal likelihood estimator.
decision.not_concluded: No gradient correctness, SIR correctness, posterior correctness, HMC readiness, or production validity.
decision.primary_criterion: Failure requires abs(delta)/MCSE > 2 and abs(delta)/seed_sd > 2 at the same prefix.

interpretation: state_dim=1: first failures SIS=None, LEDH-no-OT=None, LEDH+OT=1.
state_dim=2: first failures SIS=None, LEDH-no-OT=None, LEDH+OT=1.
